title: Pleione longipes

This classification places it under the order Asparagales, which is a group of flowering plants. intro: Pleione longipes is a species of terrestrial orchid native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia, known for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help to reduce the severity of respiratory and gastrointestinal infections.
